display_name: STABLE-2 A/B (2026-07-13, scratchpad/_sol_stable3_0713.md). DISPERSION-MINIMIZER. Entry byte-identical to badday_young_rt_paper (rt-native + 25k liq + adaptive-size + retrace-micro-avoid + LP-rug insurance + all soft downside cutters) -> ONLY the EXIT differs. PAPER, own pool, live_probe=false, NEVER live. Goal (AxiS stability): kill the per-bot P&L swings. Levers = min-hold 120s floor (the ONLY proven ex-top-2 mover: suppresses panic-cuts in first 120s, TP1/TP2 still fire) + EARLY-BANK 0.90@+5 + TIGHT downside cap -10 (bank earlier & bigger, tighter hard stop). Replay on rt+absorb (n=377, 4-half OOS, ex-top-2 token-median, scrub applied): STD 11.53->9.77 (-15.3%), mean +1.87, med +4.92, ex2 +2.90, WR 71, cat 1.1%, tokens-green 73%, 4/4 halves green. Grade vs badday_young_rt_paper/exit_control at n>=30 closes: WIN = materially LOWER per-trip STD with mean not worse + 4-half green hold. Dispersion is the metric, NOT mean (capture_ab is the mean-maximizer; these are the swing-killers).
